name: Alex Skills OS
description: 6 Hormozi-style scaling skills for ChatGPT: Market Breakdown, Problem Prioritization, Offer Creation, Distribution Domination, Viral Content Engine, Scale System.
conversation_starters: Break down the [niche] market for me
Find the most expensive problems in [industry]
Build a distribution plan to reach 1M people
Build a scale system for my [business]
setup_instructions: 1. Go to platform.openai.com/gpts → Create a GPT
2. Paste ALL of chatgpt/system-prompt.md into Instructions
4. Test: 'Break down the B2B SaaS coaching market for me'
